items.raw_excerpt: Return without question: grief charity pleads with thieves to return thousands of dollars worth of plants stolen from memorial garden in Dubbo.
items.summary_en: Thieves took thousands of dollars worth of plants from a memorial garden in Dubbo. A grief charity is pleading for the return of the trees. They were planted in memory of loved ones.
items.summary_ko: 호주 더보의 한 기념 정원에서 수천 달러 상당의 식물이 도난당했습니다. 사랑하는 사람들을 위해 심어진 나무를 돌려달라고 자선 단체가 호소하고 있습니다.
items.title_en: Thieves steal memorial garden trees for loved ones
items.title_ko: 기념 정원의 나무를 훔친 도둑들
items.title_original: Thieves steal memorial garden trees dedicated to loved ones

items.raw_excerpt: KOLKATA: Teacher Raja Dey fears attendance might drop now that government-run schools have stopped serving eggs for lunch in his eastern Indian state, a dietary change that has stirred a political storm.The humble egg, a popular food in West Bengal, was taken off the menu after the state's recently elected Hi
items.summary_en: Teacher Raja Dey fears school attendance will drop after West Bengal stopped serving eggs in government-run lunches. The popular egg was removed from menus after the state's recent election, stirring political controversy.
items.summary_ko: 인도 서벵갈주의 한 교사가 정부 학교 급식에서 계란이 빠진 후 출석률이 떨어질까 걱정하고 있다. 최근 선거 이후 인기 있는 계란이 메뉴에서 삭제되면서 정치적 논란이 커지고 있다.
items.title_en: Egg-free school meals scramble politics in India
items.title_ko: 인도 서벵갈 학교 급식에서 계란 빠지자 정치 논란
items.title_original: Egg-free school meals scramble politics in India

items.raw_excerpt: “Down East Maine is arguably the most American place in America.”
items.summary_en: An opinion piece argues that Down East Maine represents the most authentically American place in the country. The writer says Maine's small-town spirit captures the true essence of the American republic.
items.summary_ko: 메인주 동부 지역이 미국에서 가장 미국적인 곳이라는 주장이 나왔다. 글쓴이는 메인주의 작은 마을 정신이 미국 공화국의 진정한 본질을 담고 있다고 말한다.
items.title_en: Maine's Small-Town Spirit Is the Essence of the American Republic
items.title_ko: 메인주의 작은 마을 정신, 미국 공화국의 본질
items.title_original: Opinion: Maine’s small-town spirit is the essence of the American republic - Bangor Daily News

items.raw_excerpt: Swedish telecoms giant Ericsson reported a 12 percent fall in second quarter net profit to 4.1 billion kronor (370 million euros), affected by a 6 percent decline in sales and rising component costs.
items.summary_en: Swedish telecom company Ericsson reported a 12 percent drop in second quarter net profit. Profit fell to 4.1 billion kronor as sales declined 6 percent and component costs rose. The results reflect ongoing pressures in the global telecom equipment market.
items.summary_ko: 스웨덴 통신기업 에릭슨은 2분기 순이익이 12% 하락했다고 발표했다. 매출 6% 감소와 부품비 상승으로 순이익은 41억 크로나로 떨어졌다. 전 세계 통신장비 시장의 지속적인 압박을 반영한 실적이다.
items.title_en: Sales Slide Takes Ericsson Net Profits Down 12 Percent
items.title_ko: 에릭슨, 매출 하락으로 2분기 순이익 12% 급락
items.title_original: Sales slide takes Ericsson net profits down 12 percent

items.raw_excerpt: After hailstones the size of tennis balls caused damage in northern Germany, forecasters are warning that more severe thunderstorms, heavy rain and intense heat could affect other parts of the country this week.
items.summary_en: Hailstones the size of tennis balls recently caused damage in northern Germany. Forecasters are warning of more severe thunderstorms, heavy rain, and intense heat for other parts of the country this week.
items.summary_ko: 최근 독일 북부에는 테니스 공 크기의 우박이 떨어져 피해가 발생했습니다. 이번 주에는 다른 지역들에서도 강한 폭우와 폭염, 심한 뇌우가 이어질 것으로 예보되었습니다.
items.title_en: Heat and hail: What to expect from the weather in Germany this week
items.title_ko: 폭염과 우박: 이번 주 독일의 날씨는 어떻게 될까
items.title_original: Heat and hail: What to expect from the weather in Germany this week

items.raw_excerpt: Vienna’s outdoor pools are a summer institution: equal parts relaxation and passive-aggressive towel placement. Whether you’re new or just fed up with losing the best spot, here’s your survival guide.
items.summary_en: Vienna's outdoor pools are a beloved summer tradition for locals. Finding the perfect spot can be tricky due to intense competition. This guide offers practical tips on pool etiquette and sunbed strategies.
items.summary_ko: 비엔나의 야외 수영장은 현지인들이 사랑하는 여름 전통입니다. 완벽한 자리를 차지하기는 치열한 경쟁 때문에 어려울 수 있습니다. 이 가이드는 수영장 매너와 썬베드 전략에 대한 실용적인 팁을 제공합니다.
items.title_en: From Sunbed Wars to Schnitzel: Vienna's Pool Survival Guide
items.title_ko: 썬베드 쟁탈전에서 슈니첼까지: 비엔나 수영장 생존 가이드
items.title_original: From sunbed wars to Schnitzel: Survival rules for Vienna's outdoor pools

items.raw_excerpt: The NRMA is encouraging all states and territories to follow the lead of NSW in removing reduced speed limits for roadworks outside construction hours.
items.summary_en: New South Wales has removed reduced speed limits for roadworks when no workers are on site. The NRMA is encouraging other states to follow this lead. Drivers say the old rules caused unnecessary delays.
items.summary_ko: 뉴사우스웨일즈주가 작업자가 현장에 없을 때 적용되던 도로공사 속도제한을 폐지했습니다. NRMA는 다른 주들도 이 조치를 따라야 한다고 촉구하고 있습니다. 운전자들은 이전 규칙이 불필요한 정체를 유발했다고 환영하고 있습니다.
items.title_en: NSW Scrapes Frustrating Roadwork Speed Limits
items.title_ko: NSW, 작업자 없을 때 도로공사 속도제한 폐지
items.title_original: NSW scrapped this 'frustrating' road rule. Should other jurisdictions follow?

items.raw_excerpt: Advocates say a province-wide educational assistant shortage is leaving high-needs students unsupported and forcing classroom evacuations, while the province highlights record funding.
items.summary_en: Educational assistant shortage is leaving high-needs students unsupported in Ontario. Classroom evacuations are being forced due to the shortage. The province claims record funding while advocates report ongoing problems.
items.summary_ko: 교육 보조원 부족으로 고위험 학생들이 지원을 받지 못하고 있다. 교실 대피가 강제되는 상황이 발생하고 있다. 지방 정부는 기록적인 예산을 주장하지만 현장에서는 여전히 문제가 지속되고 있다.
items.title_en: Ontario education workers raise alarm about EA shortage ahead of contract deadline
items.title_ko: Ontario 교육 종사자들, 계약 마감 전 교육 보조원 부족 문제 제기
items.title_original: Ontario education workers raise alarm about EA shortage ahead of contract deadline

items.raw_excerpt: Residents and business owners say vendors are increasingly selling everything from alcohol and food to sunglasses and electronics in broad daylight.
items.summary_en: Residents and business owners in Helsinki say vendors are selling suspected stolen goods on the streets. The items include alcohol, food, sunglasses, and electronics. The sales happen in broad daylight.
items.summary_ko: 헬싱키 주민과 사업주들은 상인들이 대낮에 길거리에서 의심되는 도난품을 공공연히 판매하고 있다고 말합니다. 판매 물품은 술, 음식, 선글라스, 전자기기 등 다양합니다.
items.title_en: Suspected stolen goods openly sold on Helsinki streets
items.title_ko: 헬싱키 거리에서 의심되는 도난품이 공공연히 판매되고 있다
items.title_original: From meat to Ray-Bans: Suspected stolen goods openly sold on Helsinki streets

items.raw_excerpt: A Tamil Nadu teen was critically injured in Varkala, Kerala, after a music dispute led to a violent stabbing; two arrested.
items.summary_en: A teenager from Tamil Nadu was critically injured after a late-night music dispute in Varkala, Kerala. Two suspects have been arrested in connection with the stabbing.
items.summary_ko: 타밀나두 출신 10대 관광객이 케랄라주 바르칼라에서 심야 음악 시비로 흉기에 찔려 중상을 입었다. 경찰은 2명을 체포했다.
items.title_en: Teen tourist stabbed after music dispute in Kerala's Varkala
items.title_ko: 케랄라 바르칼라에서 심야 음악 시비로 10대 관광객 흉기 찔려
items.title_original: T.N. teen tourist stabbed after late-night music dispute in Kerala’s Varkala; two arrested

items.raw_excerpt: Norway's football team receives heroes' welcome in Oslo, the country braces for a record 37C heatwave, and more news from Norway on Tuesday.
items.summary_en: Norway's national football team received a heroes' welcome from fans in Oslo after their recent success. The country is also preparing for a record-breaking 37C heatwave this week. It is an unusually hot summer for the Nordic nation.
items.summary_ko: 노르웨이 축구대표팀이 최근 성과로 오슬로에서 팬들의 열렬한 환영을 받았다. 이번 주 37도에 달하는 기록적인 폭염이 예고되어 전국이 대비에 나섰다. 북유럽 국가치고는 이례적인 무더위가 찾아왔다.
items.title_en: Norway's football team gets heroes' welcome in Oslo as country braces for record heatwave
items.title_ko: 노르웨이 축구대표팀, 오슬로에서 팬들의 열렬한 환영 받아… 37도 폭염도 예고
items.title_original: Today in Norway: A roundup of the latest news on Tuesday

items.raw_excerpt: The giant petrel was taken to RSPCA Queensland's Wildlife Rehabilitation Centre where it underwent testing by Biosecurity Queensland as part of its surveillance program.
items.summary_en: A giant petrel was found on a Noosa beach and taken to RSPCA Queensland's Wildlife Rehabilitation Centre. Biosecurity Queensland tested the bird as part of its surveillance program. The results came back negative for bird flu.
items.summary_ko: 노사 해변에서 거대한 바다제비가 발견되어 퀸스랜드 RSPCA 야생동물 재활 센터로 옮겨졌다. 퀸스랜드 생물안보 당국이 감시 프로그램 일환으로 조류인플루엔자 검사를 실시했으며, 결과는 음성으로 확인됐다.
items.title_en: Giant petrel found on Noosa beach tests negative for bird flu
items.title_ko: 노사 해변서 발견된 거대 바다제비, 조류인플루엔자 음성 판정
items.title_original: Giant petrel found on Noosa beach tests negative for bird flu

items.raw_excerpt: Peddapally engineer caught allegedly accepting ₹2 lakh bribe; ACB seizes ₹32.31 lakh in unaccounted cash during the investigation.
items.summary_en: A municipal assistant engineer in Peddapally, Telangana was caught by the Anti-Corruption Bureau while allegedly accepting a 2 lakh rupee bribe. Officers seized over 32 lakh rupees in unaccounted cash during the investigation.
items.summary_ko: 텔랑가나주 페다팔리 시의회 기술보좌원이 부패방지국에 의해 20만루피 뇌물을 받은 현장에서 적발됐다. 수사 과정에서 미신고 현금 320만루피가 넘는 돈이 압수됐다.
items.title_en: Small-town engineer caught taking bribe in Telangana
items.title_ko: 텔랑가나 소도시 공무원, 뇌물 수수 현장 적발
items.title_original: Peddapally Municipal Assistant Engineer trapped while accepting ₹2 lakh bribe

items.raw_excerpt: Dutch archaeologists from Leiden University have discovered a 3,000-year-old tomb near the southern Egyptian city of Luxor. According to the Egyptian Ministry of Tourism and Antiquities, which has been collaborating with the Leiden team there since 2018, the tomb belonged to a man named Paser and dates back to the Ramesside period (circa 1292 to 1069 BC). “With our research into the tomb’s painted wall decoration and the archaeological finds, we hope to learn more about Paser and others who...
items.summary_en: Archaeologists from Leiden University discovered a 3,000-year-old tomb near the Egyptian city of Luxor. The tomb belonged to a man named Paser and dates back to the Ramesside period. Researchers hope to learn more about the ancient people buried there.
items.summary_ko: 네덜란드 라이덴 대학교 고고학자들이 이집트 룩소르 근처에서 3000년 된 무덤을 발견했다. 이 무덤은 파세르라는 남성의 것으로 라메세스 시대에 만들어졌다. 연구자들은 이곳에 묻힌 고대 사람들에 대해 더 많은 것을 알기를 기대하고 있다.
items.title_en: Dutch Archaeologists Find 3,000-Year-Old Egyptian Tomb
items.title_ko: 네덜란드 고고학자, 3000년 된 이집트 무덤 발견
items.title_original: Dutch Archaeologists discover 3,000-year-old Egyptian tomb

items.raw_excerpt: Federal Court proceedings have been dropped against the former company responsible for caring for South Australian woman Ann Marie Smith, who died six years ago.
items.summary_en: Federal Court proceedings have been dropped against the company that cared for South Australian woman Ann Marie Smith, who died six years ago. The case involved the former provider responsible for her care under the NDIS.
items.summary_ko: 남호주의 앤 마리 스미스 씨를 돌보던 회사에 대한 연방 법원 절차가 취소되었다. 그녀는 6년 전에 사망했으며, 이번 사건은 NDIS 하에서 그녀의 돌봄을 담당했던 전 공급자와 관련이 있다.
items.title_en: Legal action dropped against Ann Marie Smith's NDIS provider
items.title_ko: 앤 마리 스미스의 NDIS 공급자에 대한 법적 조치 취소
items.title_original: Legal action dropped against Ann Marie Smith's NDIS provider

items.raw_excerpt: Then Shing Chong had drunk a litre of beer over six hours before the crash.
items.summary_en: Shing Chong drank a litre of beer over six hours before crashing his car into the famous Fountain of Wealth at Suntec City in Singapore. He has been sentenced to jail and given a driving ban for the incident.
items.summary_ko: 싱가포르의 유명 명소인 신호시티 분수대에 음주 상태로 차량을 돌진한 남자가 징역형과 면허 정지 처벌을 받았다. 그는 사고 전 6시간 동안 맥주 1리터를 마신 것으로 확인되었다.
items.title_en: Man who drove into Suntec City's Fountain of Wealth gets jail, driving ban
items.title_ko: 신호시티 분수대에 차량 돌진한 남자, 징역 및 면허 정지 선고
items.title_original: Man who drove into Suntec City's Fountain of Wealth gets jail, driving ban

items.raw_excerpt: The family of a beloved member of the Northern Territory's motorsport community has urged a court to send a woman who failed to give way to him to jail over the fatal crash.
items.summary_en: A woman caused a fatal crash by failing to give way to a motorcyclist. The rider was a beloved member of the local motorsport community. His family is asking the court to send the woman to jail.
items.summary_ko: 여성이 오토바이 운전자에게 양보하지 않아 치명적인 교통사고가 발생했습니다. 숨진 운전자는 현지 모터스포츠 커뮤니티의 소중한 회원이었습니다. 가족은 법원에 여성의 구속을 요구하고 있습니다.
items.title_en: Motorcyclist's family urges court to jail woman who failed to give way
items.title_ko: 가족, 양보하지 않은 여성의 구속을 법원에 요구
items.title_original: Motorcyclist's family urges court to jail woman who failed to give way

items.raw_excerpt: Explore how Indian cities can proactively manage urban trees to prevent tragic incidents like the Chembur tree fall.
items.summary_en: Indian cities are learning to better care for their urban trees after accidents where falling trees hurt people. Officials want to make sure trees in cities are healthy and safe for everyone. This helps keep both people and trees safe in busy cities.
items.summary_ko: 인도 도시들이 가로수로 인한 사고를 예방하기 위해 나무 관리 방법을 개선하고 있습니다. 당국은 도시의 나무들이 건강하고 안전하게 유지되도록 노력하고 있습니다. 이를 통해 바쁜 도시에서 시민과 나무가 모두 안전하게 공존할 수 있을 것으로 기대됩니다.
items.title_en: Indian Cities Learn to Protect People from Dangerous Urban Trees
items.title_ko: 인도 도시들, 위험한 가로수로부터 시민 보호 방법 모색
items.title_original: No more Chemburs: How can Indian cities ensure their trees do not ‘turn against’ their people

items.raw_excerpt: The Netherlands is heading for a serious water shortage, according to Harold van Waveren, chairman of the national committee for water distribution (LCW). “It is only the beginning of July and the summer still has two months to go,” he told broadcaster NOS. “If this drought continues, it could become a serious drought.” He compared the summer of 2026 to one exactly 50 years ago. “That is our reference year. I hope we don’t experience a summer like that again,...
items.summary_en: The Netherlands is heading for a serious water shortage as river levels fall. With two months of summer remaining, officials fear a repeat of a major drought from 50 years ago. The national water distribution committee warns the situation could worsen if dry conditions continue.
items.summary_ko: 네덜란드가 강 수위 하락으로 심각한 물 부족 상황에 처해 있다. 여름이 두 달이나 남은 가운데 정부 관계자는 50년 전 대가뭄이 재현될까 우려하고 있다. 물 분배 위원회 위원장은 건조한 날씨가 지속되면 상황이 더 악화될 수 있다고 경고했다.
items.title_en: Netherlands Faces Serious Water Shortage Risk
items.title_ko: 네덜란드, 심각한 물 부족 위기 직면
items.title_original: Risk of serious water shortages as river levels fall

items.raw_excerpt: Tasmania's top health official says the Launceston General Hospital is experiencing "impacted" capacity and is urging patients to only attend if it is a medical emergency.
items.summary_en: Tasmania's top health official says Launceston General Hospital is experiencing impacted capacity. Patients are being urged to only attend for medical emergencies.
items.summary_ko: 태즈메이니아 최고 보건 관리에 따르면 라운스턴 종합병원은 현재 수용 능력에 영향을 받고 있습니다. 환자들에게는 응급 의료 상황에만 방문할 것을 요청하고 있습니다.
items.title_en: Launceston General Hospital at capacity due to high demand
items.title_ko: 라운스턴 종합병원, 수요 급증으로 수용 한계
items.title_original: Launceston General Hospital experiencing 'impacted' capacity due to high demand
